PARAM.description: the second Annotation to compare, {@code null} returns {@code false} unless both are {@code null}

RETURN.description: true if the two annotations are equal or both null
RETURN.assertion: assert methodResultID == (args[0] == null && args[1] == null) || (args[0] != null && args[0].equals(args[1]));
RETURN.content: true if the two annotations are {@code equal} or both {@code null}
